data.content:
[plan] Implementation plan for TAXONOMY result-event entry

Scope: TAXONOMY.md only (docs). Two existing files referenced for citations.

## Approach (single PR, single docs file)

1. Add a new "## Normalized events" section to TAXONOMY.md after the
   existing "## Verbs" or "## Phrases" section (preserve existing
   alphabetical order within sections).
2. Add `### \`result\` event` under Normalized events with the exact
   contract from the knot description.
3. Rewrite `### Turn` (TAXONOMY.md:287-289) to remove the loose "one
   result out" wording and reference the new `result` event entry.

## Citations to anchor (verified, current)

- `src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts:92` — normalizeOpenCodeStepFinish
  (returns null unless reason==="error", per 49a17082)
- `src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts:117` — normalizeOpenCodeSessionIdle
  (synthesizes {type:"result"} from session_idle)
- `src/lib/opencode-event-translate.ts:264` — translateSessionIdle
- `src/lib/opencode-event-translate.ts:290` — translateSessionStatus
  (filters to status.type==="idle")
- `src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:170` — jsonrpc transport
  emits onTurnEnded on type==="turn.completed" (Codex)
- `src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:193` — acp transport emits
  on translator-emitted result (Gemini)
- `src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:246` — stdio transport
  (Claude/Copilot/OpenCode-injected) emits on type==="result"
- `src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:1-27` — module-level docstring
  already encodes the per-transport contract; the TAXONOMY entry is the
  human-readable mirror of that.
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-follow-up.ts:11-17` — DO NOT list that
  bans re-introducing payload-shape gates. Quote it in the
  anti-patterns section.

## File-by-file changes

- TAXONOMY.md
  - Add `## Normalized events` section header.
  - Add `### \`result\` event` entry with: definition, per-transport
    sources (with file:line citations), DOES authorize list, does NOT
    authorize list, anti-patterns to grep for during review.
  - Rewrite `### Turn` to drop "one result out" phrasing and link to
    the new `result` event entry.
  - Update `Last auto-run:` line is NOT touched (this is a human edit;
    leave the auto-run line as-is per file's stated convention).

## Test strategy

- This is docs-only. Validation:
  - `bun run lint` (no code changes, but project lints markdown files).
  - `bunx tsc --noEmit` (sanity, in case TAXONOMY.md content ever
    referenced from build).
  - Visual review that markdown rendering is clean (numbered lists
    nest correctly).
- Acceptance: a `grep` for the phrase "result event" in TAXONOMY.md
  returns the new entry; `grep -A2 "### Turn"` shows the rewritten
  definition without "one result out" phrasing.

## Risks

- Almost none. Docs-only change. The only risk is mis-citing line
  numbers; mitigation is grep-validate every cited line at write time.
- The `## How to read this file` block says `<!-- human -->` marks
  hand-written entries — the new `result` entry will use that marker
  so the next /taxonomize run preserves it.

## Complexity

Trivial. Single file, ~60 lines added, ~3 lines rewritten.
